key_interfaces.name: load_global_config
key_interfaces.description: Load global config from TOML, filling defaults for missing keys (update.channel, update.auto_upgrade)

key_interfaces.name: save_global_config
key_interfaces.description: Write global config to TOML file, creating parent dirs

key_interfaces.name: resolve_server
key_interfaces.description: Resolve server reference to {host, port, tls, password} dict from global config or presets

key_interfaces.name: ensure_server_in_global
key_interfaces.description: Add a server entry to global config if it doesn't exist, save and return config

key_interfaces.name: get_config_value
key_interfaces.description: Get value from config by dotted key (e.g. 'update.channel')

key_interfaces.name: set_config_value
key_interfaces.description: Set value in config by dotted key with auto bool conversion

user_flows.name: resolve IRC server for project
steps: check if server_ref is a named entry in global [servers]
check if it matches a hostname in server_presets (from defaults.toml)
fall back to raw hostname with default port 6667, no TLS
